MINI MINUTES: Defendants and Cross-Complainants AMI SHAH and BHUPENDRA SHAH'S motion to removed case from Arbitration Hearing List is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Order signed.
